name: The home lab
eulogy: Plex server, HTPC, CachyOS on the desktop. The one hobby that survives every purge, because it's just the day job wearing pajamas. Current status: one tweak from perfect, as always.

name: Piano
eulogy: Got far enough to feel good, which it turns out was the goal all along. Took music theory down with it. May rise again when the kid wants lessons.

name: Game development
eulogy: Made a cat/boat racing game for CS50 and retired at the top. Undefeated: one game made, one game finished.

name: Running
eulogy: The shoes were purchased. The shoes remain. We don't talk about the shoes.
